snippet.title: Baccarat Rouge 540 vs £4.95 Dupe: Strangers Can't Tell | Street Test Liverpool
snippet.description:
Can people tell the difference between a £250 designer fragrance and a £29.95 inspired-by version? We hit the streets of Liverpool to find out.

Five Forty by The Fragrance World is inspired by Baccarat Rouge 540. Formulated at 22-30% oil concentration (EDP grade). Same scent profile, fraction of the price.

WHAT IS THE FRAGRANCE WORLD?
The Fragrance World UK creates luxury-inspired fragrances at 22-30% oil concentration. We are based in Liverpool, UK. Over 226,000 customers. Rated 4.8 on Trustpilot with 7,600+ verified reviews. Vegan and cruelty-free.

TRY IT YOURSELF
Five Forty 5ml tester: £4.95
Five Forty 50ml: £29.95
Five Forty 100ml: £39.95
Shop: https://thefragranceworld.co.uk/product/five-forty/

BUILD A BUNDLE
3 x 50ml for £59.99 (save 33%): https://thefragranceworld.co.uk/bundles/

ALL PRODUCTS
https://thefragranceworld.co.uk/shop/

COMPARE
Five Forty vs Baccarat Rouge: https://thefragranceworld.co.uk/product/five-forty/

ABOUT US
https://thefragranceworld.co.uk/about/
Based in Liverpool, UK. Founded 2022. 74 fragrances, 5 body mists, 4 reed diffusers.
22-30% oil concentration. Vegan. Cruelty-free.

FOLLOW US
Instagram: https://instagram.com/thefragranceworld.co.uk

Facebook: https://facebook.com/thefragranceworlduk

REVIEWS
